summary: Market Mode enhancements testing complete. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working: Training mode with clickable products, Start Session creates LIVE session, CASH/EFTPOS payment buttons, Transaction log with edit/delete icons on hover, Pause/Resume toggle with Save & End disabled when paused, Excel export button.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Owner login successful (owner@grillshack.nz)
Backend: GET /api/products - Returns 10 products
Backend: GET /api/markets - Returns markets list
Backend: GET /api/market-mode/sessions/active - Returns active session or null
Backend: POST /api/market-mode/sessions - Start new market session
Backend: POST /api/market-mode/sessions/{id}/transaction - Add CASH transaction
Backend: POST /api/market-mode/sessions/{id}/transaction - Add EFTPOS transaction
Backend: PUT /api/market-mode/sessions/{id}/transaction/{txn_id} - Edit transaction (change qty, payment method)
Backend: DELETE /api/market-mode/sessions/{id}/transaction/{txn_id} - Delete transaction
Backend: POST /api/market-mode/sessions/{id}/end - End session and create formal session
Backend: GET /api/export/market-transactions-excel - Returns Excel file with transactions
Backend: PUT non-existent transaction returns 404
Backend: DELETE non-existent transaction returns 404
Frontend: Market Mode loads in TRAINING mode with products clickable
Frontend: Session indicator shows TRAINING when no active session
Frontend: Products can be tapped without active session (training mode)
Frontend: Start Session button creates active LIVE session
Frontend: CASH button completes order and adds to transaction log
Frontend: EFTPOS button completes order and adds to transaction log
Frontend: Transaction log shows orders with timestamp and payment method
Frontend: Pause button switches to PAUSED state with amber indicator
Frontend: Save & End button is DISABLED when session is paused
Frontend: Resume button re-enables recording
Frontend: Export Excel button present in transaction log header
critical_code_review_comments: Market Mode implementation is complete and well-structured
Training mode allows product practice without recording transactions
Pause/idle toggle correctly disables Save & End to prevent accidental session end
Transaction edit/delete endpoints properly validate session and transaction existence
Excel export includes all transaction details with timestamps
seed_data_creation: None - used existing products and markets
context_for_next_testing_agent: Market Mode enhancements verified. Key features: (1) Training mode - products clickable without active session, TRAINING indicator shown. (2) LIVE session - Start Session creates active session, products add to order, CASH/EFTPOS complete transactions. (3) Pause/Resume - Pause button shows PAUSED state with amber indicator, Save & End disabled, Resume re-enables. (4) Transaction log - shows all transactions with edit (pencil) and delete (trash) icons on hover. (5) Excel export - button in header and transaction log downloads .xlsx file. Backend endpoints: POST /api/market-mode/sessions, POST/PUT/DELETE /api/market-mode/sessions/{id}/transaction/{txn_id}, GET /api/export/market-transactions-excel.
